reviews.review_description:
This is game is not even finished on the 1st step. Missing 1 last piece of the paper, can’t open up doors, drawers, cupboards etc. 
you only collect 5 pcs of the map, missing 1 pcs. That’s it of the game. 
Not worth the purchase if you’re not even finished with one phase. 
Looks like it would be fun if you would At less finish 1st round before putting out.

This game has the chance to be great but unfortunately it is unfinished. The first task is to get the map pieces and you can't even collect them all. There is no way to open doors, cupboards or even go downstairs. Bought on early access so hoping it gets finished soon and I can actually play it.
